options.name: -existOnServer
options.description: print out all licenses that exist on the license server

options.name: -optionList
options.description: ordered list to limit automatic optional license check-out. Use -status to see legal names

options.name: -status
options.description: current status of all licenses and specified -wait <t>

options.name: -wait
options.description: wait for up to t minutes when checking-out optional license
